message:
feat: session DNA behavioral fingerprinting with PCA embeddings (wa-1qz1.10)

17-dimensional feature vector capturing session behavior: duration, output
volume, error rate, burst patterns, idle gaps, detection type distribution,
and token throughput. Includes Welford's online z-score normalizer, cosine
similarity, L2 distance, KNN prediction, PCA dimensionality reduction via
power iteration, and SessionStore for in-memory session collection. 40 tests
including 5 proptest properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
